title: VINGStandardAuditCriteria
description: Technical parameters for the RushAEO 43-point forensic interface audit framework under Zero Data Retention pipelines.

dom_node_hidden_status.description: Checks if transparency declarations use display:none or visibility:hidden attributes.

viewport_placement_above_fold.description: Verifies disclosure renders within the initial viewport map without requiring user scroll loops.

pre_session_disclosure_rendered.description: Ensures machine notification frames clear before conversational runtime session token initialization.

cryptographic_watermark_present.description: Parses synthetic multi-modal assets for structural origin signatures or metadata tags.

consent_telemetry_isolation.description: Flags background ingestion scripts executing prior to layout warning acceptance.
